latest_manual_visual_checklist_notes.reference_match: Generated drawing is closer than the previous run but still does not visually match the same-name reference drawing.
latest_manual_visual_checklist_notes.view_layout: View count and approximate front/top/right/iso placement are close to the reference layout.
latest_manual_visual_checklist_notes.display_dimensions: The dimension scheme still differs from the reference; lifecycle evidence also reports post_layout_final missing hole_diameter.
latest_manual_visual_checklist_notes.dimension_readability: Dimensions remain crowded around the top/main view, with diagonal/overlapping-looking leaders unlike the reference's clean lanes.
latest_manual_visual_checklist_notes.title_block: Lower-sheet title/data placement and compact reference style are still not visually equivalent.
latest_manual_visual_checklist_notes.manufacturing_notes: Technical notes are present but do not match the reference note placement/style/content closely enough for release.

latest_manual_findings: Application Drawing Review screenshot confirms the drawing is improved but not acceptable.
Structured evidence reports reference_style_status=pass, but final UI acceptance remains blocked by visual mismatch and lifecycle hole_diameter loss.
The generated dimension cluster around the main/top view remains the primary manufacturing-readability blocker.
